{{Infobox character
| name = Orlina
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orlina]] is the daughter of [[Chaim]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orlina]] is [[Chaim]]'s daughter and was a victim of [[Cormac]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orlina]] died.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Orlina]] was killed by [[Cormac]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
